items.caption: A collage featuring the supreme court building, which is the building where the supreme court works and meets. the collage includes a photograph of the building, a flagpole with the american flag, and other images that seem to be related to the supreme court or the legal system. the text "supreme court building" is prominently displayed, indicating the subject of the collage. the collage appears to be educational or informative in nature, likely used to teach about the supreme court and its significance in the united states.
